creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: miwi
Date: Mon Apr 29 14:19:40 2013
New Revision: 316817
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/316817

Log:
  - Update to 0.8.4
  
  PR:		178157
  Submitted by:	Ports Fury

Modified:
  head/devel/py-repl/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/devel/py-repl/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/devel/py-repl/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)
  head/devel/py-repl/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/devel/py-repl/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/py-repl/Makefile	Mon Apr 29 14:18:47 2013	(r316816)
+++ head/devel/py-repl/Makefile	Mon Apr 29 14:19:40 2013	(r316817)
@@ -1,13 +1,10 @@
-# New ports collection makefile for:	py-repl
-# Date created:		16 July 2002
-# Whom:			Hye-Shik Chang
-#
+# Created by: Hye-Shik Chang
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	repl
-PORTVERSION=	0.8.1
+PORTVERSION=	0.8.4
 CATEGORIES=	devel python
-MASTER_SITES=	http://codespeak.net/pyrepl/
+MASTER_SITES=	CHEESESHOP
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
 DISTNAME=	pyrepl-${PORTVERSION}
 DIST_SUBDIR=	python
@@ -15,9 +12,14 @@ DIST_SUBDIR=	python
 MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	Replacement for readline and interactive environment for Python
 
+LICENSE=	MIT
+
 USE_PYTHON=	yes
-USE_PYDISTUTILS=	yes
-USE_PYTHON_PREFIX=	yes
+USE_PYDISTUTILS=	easy_install
 PYDISTUTILS_PKGNAME=	pyrepl
 
+post-patch:
+	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e \
+		's|platforms =.*|zip_safe = False,|' ${WRKSRC}/setup.py
+
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

    without having their histories interfering.

+WWW: http://bitbucket.org/pypy/pyrepl/
